label: Bronze (Raw)
description: Immutable raw data from APIs, CSVs, and GeoJSON files

label: Silver (Cleaned)
description: Validated, cleaned data with schema enforcement

label: Gold (Features)
description: Feature-enriched data with spatial and macro features

label: Platinum (Unified)
description: Predictions, unified exports, and aggregate metrics

label: Appreciation Hotspots
description: Statistically significant price appreciation clusters (top 20 planning areas by YoY growth).

label: Block Profiles
description: Per-block transaction summary (~10K rows). Contains median price, PSF, transaction count, and average remaining lease.

label: Cleaned Condo Transactions
description: Validated and cleaned condo/EC transactions with standardized types.

area_sqft.description: Floor area in square feet (raw source column)

unit_price_psf.description: Price per square foot in SGD

sale_date.description: Date of sale for URA private transactions

type_of_sale.description: Sale type (New Sale, Sub Sale, Resale)

area_sqm.description: Floor area in square meters (raw source column)

unit_price_psm.description: Price per square meter in SGD

nett_price.description: Nett price after discounts/rebates in SGD

number_of_units.description: Number of units in the transaction

floor_level.description: Floor level range as a string (e.g., '01 TO 05')

label: Cleaned HDB Transactions
description: Validated and cleaned HDB transactions with standardized types and parsed fields.

storey_range.description: Storey range as a string (e.g., '10 TO 12')

flat_model.description: HDB flat model (e.g., Improved, Model A, Premium Apartment)

remaining_lease.description: Remaining lease as a string (e.g., '61 years 04 months')

storey_min.description: Lower bound of storey range (parsed from 'storey_range' field)

storey_max.description: Upper bound of storey range (parsed from 'storey_range' field)

description: Schema-validated condo transactions (enforced via HCleanCondoTransaction model). Invalid rows quarantined.

label: Geocoded Validated
description: Schema-validated geocoded properties (enforced via GeocodedProperty model). Quality-filtered by coordinate coverage threshold.

label: HDB Validated
description: Schema-validated HDB transactions (enforced via HCleanHDBTransaction model). Invalid rows quarantined.

schema.doc:
Validated HDB transaction.

storey_min/max and address are optional here because storey_range parsing
and address construction happen in downstream feature engineering stages.
remaining_lease_months can be computed from lease_commence_date if missing.

label: Location Dimension
description: One row per unique (lat, lon) pair (~10K locations). Contains all spatial proximity features, block metadata, and planning area mapping.

schema.doc:
Location dimension record — one row per unique (lat, lon) pair.

Contains all spatial features (proximity, school scores, block metadata,
planning area) computed on ~10K unique locations.

description: HDB resident population per town.

description: Median monthly household income per planning area.

description: Kindergarten locations from data.gov.sg GeoJSON.
